what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record in the channel-memory ledger; it declares an attachment with id att-b571bf9c in the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items, and points it at the board item board://item-f41c7f88 with an added timestamp.
observations: The entire payload is metadata in YAML frontmatter; there is no prose body.
It declares an attachment id att-b571bf9c.
The target is a board:// URI referencing item-f41c7f88.
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is present: 2026-06-24T05:12:10.569712+00:00.
standouts: The target is a board item referenced by a board:// URI scheme.
The attachment type is board_items, implying a cross-entity link between channel memory and a board.
It is purely a provenance/index record with no content payload.
conventions: Follows the channel-memory attachment schema: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses att- prefix for attachment identifiers.
Uses a board:// URI to reference an external board entity.
Records an explicit UTC timestamp for when the attachment was added.
concerns: The record carries no title, summary, or reason for the attachment, so its semantic intent is opaque from this file alone.
The board:// target is not resolved or described here; a reader must look elsewhere to know what item-f41c7f88 is.
No author or source message is recorded.
notes: A bare channel-memory attachment stub that links dragnet-development to board item f41c7f88, useful only once paired with the referenced board item.
questions: What content or decision does board://item-f41c7f88 represent?
Why was this board item attached to the dragnet-development channel?
What does dragnet-development denote in this project?
Is there a corresponding message or thread that created this attachment?
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, typed, timestamped pointer from a channel attachment to a board item so that channel memory can later retrieve or fuse with board content.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI target scheme inside an otherwise generic attachment metadata record.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel-memory attachment to a board item, enabling graph traversal between channel memory and board entities in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment record (att-b571bf9c) in the dragnet-development channel of type board_items that points to board://item-f41c7f88 and was added on 2026-06-24T05:12:10Z.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to link a channel-memory attachment to a specific board item for later retrieval, context, or fusion.
